caption: A close-up view captures the dashboard and ignition area of a vehicle. The interior features a dark grey instrument panel with several gauges and text displays, including labels such as "UNLEADED FUEL ONLY", "INST/AVER", "RANGE", and "FUEL". A set of keys is inserted into the ignition switch, with a white key tag hanging from the ring. To the left, the edge of a person's light-colored clothing is partially visible. As the sequence progresses, the keys are turned clockwise in the ignition. In the final frames, the movement of the keys causes a slight shift in the camera angle, and a small portion of a brown wooden trim becomes visible on the far right side of the dashboard. The overall lighting is dim, reflecting a view from the driver's seat.
